context: Realistic: WebSocket reconnection backoff grows without cap, reaching 17+ minutes of dead silence

checklist.name: Catches uncapped backoff
checklist.description: Identifies that the WebSocket reconnection backoff delay grows exponentially without a maximum cap — after several failures the delay reaches minutes or more, leaving the user with silently dead notifications and no indication

checklist.name: Risk classified yellow or higher
checklist.description: PR is classified as yellow or higher — it adds real-time communication logic
